docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ALL RISK INSURANCE SERVICES, INC. ("AARIS, INC.") AS TO DEFENDANT STEVE NORIE, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-12-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-13-2002
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-11-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-11-2002 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212
JUN 11,2002 POS OSC IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SONIA WONG.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND OF NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF, CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET, AND C.O.A., PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN ALL RISK INSURANCE SERVICES, INC. ("AARIS, INC.") SERVED JUN-12-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVE NORIE, INC.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-12-2002 CONTINUED TO AUG-16-2002 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT (S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-25-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE AUG-16-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO COMPLAINT
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO THE COMPLAINT
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-25-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
